sectionHeadings: 1. Source of the K8s knowledge (reference, not a port)
Live E2E attempt 2026-07-15 (first real deploy on hetzner-k3s)
2026-07-16: code fixes #2/#3 landed; live E2E still blocked on external state
2026-07-16 (later): live E2E passed on deployd.xyz; 006 complete
2026-07-20: the addon transferred out; this spec narrowed, not retired
record.summary: Milestone M3: operate stamped apps. The unit of placement is "one EnRaHiTu container + one volume + one ingress" on the existing hetzner-k3s cluster. deployd-api-rs (the OAP-era Rust K8s orchestrator, axum + hiqlite) donates its orchestration core as a napi-rs addon (the hiqlite-native pattern): the axum HTTP layer disappears, the K8s knowledge stays. A fleet/ Encore service exposes deploy / status / update / backup over the addon. Done-when is a fleet of ten stamped apps on one box with update and backup exercised.
record.title: Fleet: deployd's core as an in-process addon, placing EnRaHiTu apps
